services.name: AccountService
services.purpose: Owns account lifecycle, account types, balance management, and account status for all financial accounts in the system

apis.description: Create new account with specified type (checking, savings, etc.) for a customer
Get account details including current balance and status
List all accounts owned by a specific customer
Update account status (active, suspended, closed) - manager only
Update account balance after transaction processing

events.description: Published when new account is created with accountId, customerId, accountType, initialBalance
Published when account balance changes with accountId, newBalance, previousBalance, transactionId
Published when account status changes with accountId, newStatus, previousStatus, authorizedBy
Listens for completed transactions to update account balances accordingly

services.name: TransactionService
services.purpose: Owns all money movement operations, transaction history, and audit trails with authenticated user context

apis.description: Deposit money to account - requires teller+ role, captures authenticated user and optional customer ID
Withdraw money from account - requires teller+ role, captures authenticated user and optional customer ID
Transfer money between accounts - requires teller+ role, captures authenticated user
Get transaction history for account - customer sees own, teller+ sees any
Get specific transaction details including audit trail
Get all transactions performed by a specific user - manager only

events.description: Published when transaction starts with transactionId, accountId, amount, type, authenticatedUserId, customerIdOnBehalf
Published when transaction completes successfully with transactionId, accountId, amount, newBalance, authenticatedUserId
Published when transaction fails with transactionId, accountId, amount, reason, authenticatedUserId
Listens to confirm balance updates were applied successfully

services.name: UserService
services.purpose: Owns user identity, authentication, role assignments, and user lifecycle management for the banking system

apis.description: Create new user with specified role (customer, teller, manager) - manager only
Get user profile and role information
Update user role assignment - manager only
Authenticate user and return JWT token with role claims
Validate JWT token and return user context for other services
List all teller users for manager oversight
List all customer users - teller+ role required

events.description: Published when new user is created with userId, role, createdBy, customerProfile if applicable
Published when user role is updated with userId, newRole, previousRole, changedBy
Published when user is activated/deactivated with userId, newStatus, changedBy
Published on successful login with userId, role, loginTimestamp for audit trails
